## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK001 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK002 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK003 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK004 Another category item
- [ ] CHK005 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK006 Final item in this category

## Evidence and Accuracy

- [ ] CHKXXX Every factual claim cites repository, command, runtime,
      user-provided, or external evidence
- [ ] CHKXXX Assumptions, estimates, and inferences are labeled separately from
      verified facts
- [ ] CHKXXX Conflicting or missing evidence is marked with `NEEDS CLARIFICATION`
      or `TODO(<FIELD>)`
- [ ] CHKXXX Validation commands or manual checks are recorded with pass, fail,
      or not-run status
- [ ] CHKXXX Report conclusions preserve material caveats from the source
      evidence

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
